paper.title: Not so fast, not so furious: just magnetic

review.summary: Paper reports new FORS2/ESO VLT and ESPaDOnS/CFHT spectropolarimetric observations of the magnetic white dwarf WD 0810-353. One internal table (Table 1: observing log) with 10 columns covering 6 observation epochs. Raw data available at ESO archive and CADC. No machine-readable tables, supplementary data files, or code repositories were published alongside the paper. External resources: VOSA SED tool (footnote), CADC/ESO data archives.

internal_tables.role_in_paper: Documents all spectropolarimetric observations used in the analysis, including archival data from Bagnulo & Landstreet (2020) and new data from this work.

source_refs.caption: \label{Tab_Log} Log of the spectropolarimetric observations of WD\,0810-353.
source_refs.label: Tab_Log

columns.name: UT | hh:mm
columns.meaning: Universal Time at start of observation

columns.name: Instrument
columns.meaning: Name of the spectropolarimetric instrument (FORS2 or ESPaDOnS)

columns.name: Color code | in Fig.~\refNew_spectra
columns.meaning: Color used to plot this spectrum in Figure New_spectra

internal_tables.evidence: \label{Tab_Log} Log of the spectropolarimetric observations of WD\,0810-353.
internal_tables.comments: 6 rows of data (4 archival from BagLan20 + 2 new from this work). Manually typed into LaTeX source; no external machine-readable file provided.

external_resources.description: VOSA (Virtual Observatory SED Analyzer) web tool used by Jimenez-Esteban et al. (2018) to classify the target as non-DA via SED fitting.

source_refs.context: \citet{Jimenez-Esteban2018} classified this object as a non-DA, based on VOSA\footnote{http://svo2.cab.inta-csic.es/theory/vosa/} WD model spectra fits to the SED

external_resources.evidence: \citet{Jimenez-Esteban2018} classified this object as a non-DA, based on VOSA\footnote{http://svo2.cab.inta-csic.es/theory/vosa/} WD model spectra fits to the SED using synthetic J-PAS photometry derived from the Gaia spectra.
external_resources.comments: Reference to third-party tool, not data produced by this paper.

external_resources.description: Canadian Astronomical Data Centre (CADC) archive where raw ESPaDOnS/CFHT data are available. Raw FORS2/VLT data also available at ESO archive (archive.eso.org, program ID 110.25A1.001).

source_refs.context: All raw data and calibrations of FORS2 and ESPaDOnS data are available at the observatory archives: ESO archive at {\tt archive.eso.org} and the Canadian Astronomical Data Centre at {\tt https://www.cadc-ccda.hia-iha.nrc-cnrc.gc.ca/en/}.

external_resources.evidence: All raw data and calibrations of FORS2 and ESPaDOnS data are available at the observatory archives: ESO archive at {\tt archive.eso.org} and the Canadian Astronomical Data Centre at {\tt https://www.cadc-ccda.hia-iha.nrc-cnrc.gc.ca/en/}.
external_resources.comments: General archive URLs; specific datasets not identified by DOI or query parameters. ESPaDOnS data at CADC, FORS2 data at ESO archive (program ID 110.25A1.001).
